caption: The video captures a formal event at the United States Institute of Peace, where a speaker is addressing an audience. The setting includes a stage with a backdrop featuring the institute's logo and name repeated across it. A man in a suit stands on the left side of the stage, gesturing as he speaks, while another man in a suit sits to the right, holding a notepad and pen, possibly taking notes or preparing to ask questions. The audience, seated in rows, appears attentive, with some individuals using laptops. The atmosphere suggests a professional and intellectual discussion, likely centered around topics related to peace and international affairs.
